positive_feedback: Single responsibility remains read-only cross-deck detection and classification; generation and repair are explicitly delegated to run-slide-report-generate and run-slide-report-modify.

Progressive disclosure remains intact: SKILL.md routes to the R1 execution contract, workflow manifest, output schema, rule reference, and name-addressed cross-deck-reviewer adapter/R2 prompt without duplicating the full procedure in the router.

IN1 and OUT1 are purpose-specific and executable. The four-file input gate is fail-closed, machine and visual C-number ownership is unambiguous, and the Node fixture proves dirty detection plus a zero-issue clean PASS control.

Current validation evidence is validate-frontmatter exit 0, prompt-contract drift fatal=0/warn=0, feedback-contract exit 0, Node acceptance PASS, and 131 focused slide-report-generator pytest cases PASS.

notes: Genuine rubric re-evaluation was required because SKILL.md changed from the prior reviewed SHA. Existing repository-wide feedback-contract baseline warnings are non-fatal and unrelated to this skill.
